title: Optimization Plan Request
description: Strict POST /api/v1/optimization/plan request. The caller provides only enough task, dataset, objective, and budget context for the backend to return an allowlisted pre-run plan.

size.description: Number of examples available for optimization planning.

has_holdout.description: Whether the dataset already has a holdout split.

ObjectiveWeights.description: Optional objective-name to relative-weight map. Keys must match entries in objectives; cross-field consistency is enforced by consumers.

max_trials.description: Maximum trial count requested for the planned run.

cost_limit_usd.description: Maximum user-approved spend for the planned run, in USD.

task_description.description: Short natural-language description of the optimization task.

task_type.description: Optional safe task category supplied by the SDK or skill.

agent_shape.description: Optional safe label for the agent shape being optimized.

offline.description: Whether the caller requires a fully offline plan.
